calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-08-2013 Off Calendar

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar May-23-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-18-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Edward W. Suman, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Five Harvest Co., Inc.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Nancy M.F. Zheng.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Chester Ko sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Principal: $9,319.68
Pre-Judgment Interest (Which includes pre-complaint and post-complaint interest): $669.00
Attorney's Fees: $1,000.00
Costs: $515.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $11,503.68
Judgment signed in open court.
